deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'node packages/database/scripts/resolve-failed-migration.js 20260215_sole_memory_links 2>/dev/null || true && pnpm --filter @keeper/database prisma migrate deploy && echo "=== Migration complete, running seeds ===" && pnpm --filter @keeper/database prisma db seed && echo "=== DB seeds complete, seeding Cloud agent ===" && cd apps/api && node dist/scripts/seed-cloud-agent.js && echo "=== Cloud agent seeded, starting server ===" && node dist/index.js'
